invalidTime:
Invalid time format. Please use: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM AM/PM (Central Time)
Example: 2026-03-15 3:00 PM

setup.cmdDescrp: Initializes and sets up the announcement module.
setup.mcRole: The Minecraft role to ping in announcements
setup.announcementRole: The role to ping in announcements
setup.notConfigured: Announcement settings not configured. Please run `/announcement-setup` first.

create.success: Template created successfully! Here is a preview:
create.limitReached: You have reached the maximum number of templates (25). Delete a custom template to make room.
create.duplicate: A template with that name already exists.
create.invalidName: Template name must be lowercase, start with a letter or number, and contain only letters, numbers, and hyphens.
create.invalidColor: Invalid color format. Use hex format like #5865F2.

edit.success: Template updated successfully! Here is the updated preview:

delete.isDefault: Default templates cannot be deleted. You can edit them instead.

list.title: Announcement Templates
list.empty: No templates found. Run `/announcement-setup` to seed default templates, or create one with `/announcement template create`.

reset.confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all templates? This will delete all custom templates and re-seed the defaults.

send.templateNotFound: Template not found. Use `/announcement template list` to see available templates.
send.noTemplates: No templates found. Run `/announcement-setup` to set up the announcement system and seed default templates.
